🚀 Big Launches.title: GPT-Rosalind Advances Life Sciences Research
🚀 Big Launches.summary: GPT-Rosalind enhances biological reasoning, medicinal chemistry expertise, genomics analysis, and experimental workflow capabilities.

🚀 Big Launches.title: Meta's AI Agent for WhatsApp Business Now Available Globally
🚀 Big Launches.summary: WhatsApp will charge businesses for using its AI agent based on token usage.

🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.title: Wasmer Used Codex to Build a Node.js Runtime for the Edge
🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.summary: See how Wasmer used Codex with GPT-5.5 to build a Node.js runtime for the edge, accelerating development 10x to 20x and shipping in weeks instead of months.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: Toward Pre-Deployment Assurance for Enterprise AI Agents
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: Proposes an ontology-grounded verification framework for pre-deployment assurance of enterprise AI agents.

⚖️ Responsible AI.title: Google Must Let Publishers Opt Out of AI Search Features, Rules UK
⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: UK regulatory ruling requires Google to let website owners keep their content out of AI Search features.

⚖️ Responsible AI.title: AI Has a Water Problem – Google Thinks It Has a Fix
⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: Google outlines efforts to minimize environmental impact by increasing water for local communities.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: Stumbling Into AI Emotional Dependence: How Routine AI Interactions Reshape Human Connection
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: Draws on emerging empirical evidence to argue that AI emotional support is not a deliberate act.

tool_of_day.title: Wasmer
tool_of_day.summary: Open-source runtime for WebAssembly and Wasmtime, used to build a Node.js runtime for the edge with Codex and GPT-5.5.

hot_take: The AI industry is shifting towards more responsible and sustainable practices, with companies like Google and Meta prioritizing environmental impact and user control over AI features.
